title: The Promised Neverland
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (11) = 23. Manga complete at 181 chapters. S2 famously compresses ch 38-181 into 11 episodes, omitting the Goldy Pond Battle and Queen/Nobles arcs — unadapted-tail-style entries kept for the omitted material so manga-side navigation still resolves.
